title: grap — UI Element Address System (Window + UIA Scope + Web + ADB)
desc: grap = glob/regex/OR(;)/#UIA-scope/{JSON5} — universal address for any UI element. Used as first arg of every a11y command. Supports Win32 windows, UIA subtrees, browser tab portals, and Android ADB.
steps:
[WHAT-IS-GRAP] grap = UI address. Before '#' = which window. After '#' = which element inside.
  Three-tier matching: Win32 window → UIA subtree → web content (CDP).
  Output: 'a11y find <grap>' prints '# TARGET {json5}' to stdout — ready to paste into next command.

[WINDOW-PATTERNS] Before '#' — addressing a top-level window:
  Substring:   'ChatGPT'                    contains, case-insensitive
  Wildcard:    '*메모장*'                      * = any chars
  OR(;):       '*메모장*;*계산기*'           matches either
  JSON5:       {title:'Claude',proc:'chrome'}  AND logic
  HWND direct: {hwnd:0x010B084A}             instant lookup
  HWND bracket:[0012061C]                    inspect/windows output format
  Regex:       regex:^영웅문                    prefix required

[JSON5-FIELDS] All fields AND’d — use any subset:
  proc:   'chrome'            process name (no .exe)
  domain: 'claude.ai'         browser domain (CDP) — most readable for web targets
  title:  'Claude'            window title substring (30-char cap)
  hwnd:   0x010B084A          direct lookup, fastest
  pid:    19016               process ID
  cls:    'Chrome_WidgetWin_1' window class name
  url:    'https://...'       browser URL substring (CDP)
  cid:    100                 Win32 control ID
  Array OR: {title:['A','B']} — matches if title contains A or B
  TIP: '# TARGET {...}' stdout from 'a11y find' gives the exact JSON5 — just paste it.

[SCOPE-CHAIN] After '#' — UIA element drill-down. Each '#' goes one level deeper:
  '*App*#*Button*'        find Button anywhere under App
  '*App*#Panel#*OK*'      Panel first, then OK inside
  '*App*#'               empty scope = drill to keyboard-focused element
  Depth: up to 25 levels. Match: Name first, AutomationId fallback (both substring).
  Container-first: Pane/Group preferred over Button/Edit at same level.
  Regex segment: '*App*#regex:btn_\d+'

[TAB-PORTAL] Browser tab switching built into scope chain:
  '*Chrome*#ChatGPT#Send'
  → (1) find TabItem 'ChatGPT' → SelectionItem.Select() (focusless)
  → (2) 600ms wait → jump to RootWebArea
  → (3) find 'Send' inside web content
  Works on Chrome/Edge/Electron. Combine with JSON5:
  '{domain:\'claude.ai\'}#.ProseMirror'  = JSON5 window + CSS scope in web

[WIN32-CHILD] '/' drills Win32 child windows (MFC/HTS multi-window apps):
  'Parent/Child'              Win32 GetChildren, pattern match
  'Parent/Child#UiaScope'     Win32 drill THEN UIA scope
  'Window/'                   trailing / = focus-tunnel to focused child + element
  Used for 영웅문/HTS where UIA tree is fragmented across child HWNDs.
  Example: '영웅문/실시간계좌창#종목코드Edit'

[ANDROID] adb:// prefix routes to Android UIA pipeline:
  'adb://Fold5/*heromts*#해외잔고'          device / package / scope
  'adb://*heromts*#해외잔고'              auto-detect device
  'adb://Fold5:outer/*pkg*'            :outer = foldable outer display
  Format: adb://[device[:display]]/[pkg-grap]#[scope#scope...]

[NODE-TAG] Element label format in CURSOR/TARGET output (use as scope segment):
  <Button>          ControlType only
  <ButtonOK>        ControlType + AutomationId (aid)
  <Button'확인'>     ControlType + Name (no aid, 17-char cap)
  <Button2Email>    ControlType + SiblingIndex + AutomationId
  <Group x7>        7 consecutive unnamed Groups (run-length encoded)
  Use tag as scope: <ButtonOK> → #OK   <Button'확인'> → #*확인*

[FIND-OUTPUT] 'a11y find <grap>' stdout structure:
  # FOCUS {proc,domain,title,...}   focused window grap (copy-paste ready)
  # TARGET {proc,domain,title,...}  matched target grap (copy-paste ready)
  ━━━ CURSOR ━  focused element + parent chain (blocker check)
    <EditTerminal>     focused leaf
    ← <Group x7>      parent chain (run-length encoded)
  ━━━ TARGET ━  matched element node tag + rect + parent + siblings
  ━━━ VERDICT ━ ✓ accessible / ⚠ cursor in Dialog / ? unknown
  All [DIAG:*] processing logs → stderr only

[TIPS] Real-world patterns:
  # Paste & go: copy '# TARGET {...}', strip '# TARGET ', use directly
    wkappbot a11y click '{hwnd:0x010B084A,proc:\'chrome\',domain:\'chatgpt.com\'}'
  # By domain (browser)
    wkappbot a11y find '{domain:\'chatgpt.com\'}'
  # Electron (VS Code) — not browser CDP, use proc:
    '{title:\'WKAppBot\',proc:\'Code\'}'
  # HTS inner panel + UIA element
    '영웅문/실시간계좌창#종목코드Edit'
  # Wait for window to appear
    wkappbot a11y wait '*설치완료*' --condition visible --timeout 60
author: claude
